description: Routine should produce a heuristic evaluation with 3+ findings mapped to Nielsen heuristics, severity labels, cognitive walkthrough, strengths section, ranked recommendations, hand-off (but no direct engineering tickets).

input_ticket.title: Usability audit: richezamor.com speaking page
input_ticket.description: Audit the speaking page at richezamor.com/speaking. Include screenshots. Run through cognitive walkthrough: a potential event organizer wants to book Riché — can they do it? What breaks?

smoke_questions: Are there at least 3 findings (not a half-hearted 1–2)?
Does every finding reference a specific Nielsen heuristic (by name or number)?
Does every finding have a severity (Catastrophic/Major/Minor/Cosmetic)?
Does the audit include a cognitive walkthrough grounded in a specific task?
Does the hand-off correctly route Major/Catastrophic findings to Designer, NOT file type:engineering tickets directly (this would be a role violation)?
success_criteria: 3+ findings with Nielsen heuristic + severity + cognitive walkthrough + strengths + ranked recs + hands off to Designer (not engineering)
